context.projectOverview: agent-bober Phase 4 makes a 'team' a data object. Sprints 1-3 (DONE) built the Team model + loadTeam, per-team memory namespacing, and team-aware pipeline-shape selection (runPipeline accepts an additive opts.teamId, default 'programming'). Sprint 4 is the platform proof: a minimal example team defined purely as data, --team wiring on `bober run` and `bober chat`, end-to-end namespace routing, and docs that say 'adding a team is data, not code'. Almost no new abstraction — only CLI flags, a fixture, routing, and docs.

completedSprints.title: Per-team memory namespacing
completedSprints.summary: memoryDir centralizes ns->path; persistence fns + CLI/chat callers thread namespace via loadTeam; ChatSessionOptions.memoryNamespace. commit 2d89d8c.

completedSprints.title: Team-aware pipeline-shape selection
completedSprints.summary: selectPipelineEngineForTeam(team,config); runPipeline opts.teamId ?? config.defaultTeam -> loadTeam -> team.pipelineShape; programming path byte-identical. commit dc3dd4e.
